channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Arizona State’s Bobby Hurley sends team to locker room early after opponent’s ‘no class’ behavior, ejections
item.description: Tensions ran high between Arizona State and Arizona during a game Saturday, resulting in ejections and no handshake line after the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' Travis Kelce sends three-word message of support to Eagles fans as Super Bowl matchup looms
item.description: Jason Kelce spent his entire NFL career with the Eagles, the team that will take on his younger brother Travis Kelce's team — the Chiefs — in the Super Bowl next Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pelicans say Dejounte Murray ruptured his Achilles tendon and his season is over
item.description: Dejounte Murray's season is over, with the New Orleans Pelicans confirming Saturday that the standout guard ruptured his right Achilles tendon and now faces a lengthy rehab process.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shi’s unstoppable: American sophomore is a scoring machine
item.description: Shirina Shi averages 25 points per game for American-Fremont: ‘She’s a great all-around player who will get even better’
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago visits Detroit following Cunningham's 40-point game
item.description: Chicago Bulls (21-28, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Detroit Pistons (24-24, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Detroit; Sunday, 3 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Detroit hosts the Chicago Bulls after Cade Cunningham scored 40 points in the Detroit Pistons' 117-102 victory over the Dallas Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Teen girls open up on trans athlete scandal that turned their high school into a culture war battleground
item.description: Girls at Martin Luther King High School in California held a live press conference to discuss an ongoing national controversy involving a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Grand Valley Climbing Gym to host climbing competition
item.description: Zangrilli states, “The coolest thing for us is watching kids that come to us join our program, who have zero climbing experience, very quickly, find a really nice core group of kids on the team, and through that team community, they start to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Kawamoto, KREX 5

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
